mapper.sql: id, enterprise_id, name, measurement_unit, unit_price, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM bs_product WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM bs_product WHERE id = #{id} AND enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} AND deleted = 0

SELECT FROM bs_product WHERE deleted = 0
AND enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId}
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bs_product ( enterprise_id, name, measurement_unit, unit_price, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted ) VALUES ( #{enterpriseId}, #{name}, #{measurementUnit}, #{unitPrice}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, NOW(), #{updateBy}, NOW(), 0 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE bs_product
update_time = NOW(), update_by = #{updateBy}, name = #{name}, measurement_unit = #{measurementUnit}, unit_price = #{unitPrice}, remark = #{remark},
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
